questions.question: What is the primary function of an Entity Set in a Conceptual Data Model?
options: A) To define the attributes of an entity
B) To define the relationships between entities
C) To define a set of entities that share common characteristics
D) To define the schema of the database
questions.explanation: An Entity Set is a group of entities that share common characteristics and are related by a common attribute or cardinality.

questions.question: Which of the following is an example of a structural constraint?
options: A) A weak entity type
B) A strong entity type
C) A partial key
D) A generalization/specialization relationship
questions.explanation: A structural constraint is a rule that defines the relationships between entities, such as partial keys, generalization/specialization relationships, and referential integrity.

questions.question: What is the primary function of a Weak Entity Type in a Conceptual Data Model?
options: A) To define a new entity that is derived from another entity
B) To define a new attribute that is shared by multiple entities
C) To define a relationship between entities that is dependent on the existence of another entity
D) To define a new schema of the database
questions.explanation: A Weak Entity Type is used to define a new entity that is dependent on the existence of another entity, and is often used to represent a partial or dependent entity.

questions.question: What is the purpose of an ER Diagram in a Conceptual Data Model?
options: A) To define the attributes of an entity
B) To define the relationships between entities
C) To visualize the structure of the data model
D) To define the schema of the database
questions.explanation: An ER Diagram is used to visually represent the structure of the data model, including entities, relationships, and attributes.

questions.question: What is an Entity Type?
options: A) A group of entities that share common characteristics
B) A single entity that has attributes and relationships
C) A relationship between entities
D) A schema of the database
questions.explanation: An Entity Type is a single entity that has attributes and relationships, and is often used to define the characteristics of an entity in a Conceptual Data Model.
